metadata.name: Handle a Request for a Certificate of Conformance

description: A customer requires a Certificate of Conformance (CoC) for a product they have already received.

nodes.task_description: Find the customer's original sales order and the production batch/lot number for the item they received.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the order and the associated lot number.

nodes.task_description: Generate a Certificate of Conformance for that specific production lot.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent uses the quality system to generate the CoC.

nodes.task_description: Email the CoC document to the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully sends the requested document.
